Book Your Sauna Session

Experience authentic Finnish sauna at our Aldergrove location

Aldergrove Sauna

Experience our S8 mobile sauna and S2 electric sauna in a beautiful country setting.

Choose Your Experience

What's Included

  • ✓ 2-hour session
  • ✓ S8 wood-fired mobile sauna
  • ✓ S2 electric sauna
  • ✓ Beautiful country setting

Please bring your own towels and water bottles

Select Date & Time

Please select a date to see available times

Booking Summary

Type: Private Session
Date: -
Time: -
Guests: 2
Subtotal: $500
GST (5%): $25.00
Total: $525.00

You'll receive a confirmation email within 24 hours

Good to Know

Arrival

Please arrive 10 minutes early. We'll provide a brief orientation on sauna use and safety.

What to Bring

Please bring your own towels and water bottles. Swimwear is optional for private sessions.

Cancellation

Free cancellation up to 24 hours before your session. Full refund, no questions asked.

Booking Questions

How do I confirm my booking?

After submitting your request, we'll send you a confirmation email within 24 hours with payment details and final instructions.

What if my preferred time isn't available?

Contact us directly at secretsaunacompany@gmail.com and we'll do our best to accommodate your schedule.

Can I book for more than 12 people?

Our location accommodates up to 12 guests across both saunas. For larger groups, contact us to discuss options or multiple sessions.

Is the location wheelchair accessible?

Please contact us to discuss accessibility needs and we'll do our best to accommodate.

Designed by Finnish Standards, Inspired by Tradition and Rooted in Science.
